授業目的:
To explore Japan's history in the period from 1600 to 2000. The emphasis
 is on social, political, and cultural history. Based on textbook 
readings we will discuss history and historiography in general. Your 
active participation is required and will shape the actual course.
到達目標:
The participants will have a grasp of the chronology of Japan's modern 
history.  They will be able to identify important events and their 
contexts. The participants should be able to locate new pieces of 
information and analyze an unknown source.
特記事項: 【合併】総合日本学習科目（歴史Ｂ）（CIEC）/Japanese History B（国際学部）
授業の概要・背景:
Combination of lectures, short reports and classroom discussions. Discussions will be based on 1) questions we have to the text and 2) analyses and readings of sources to be contextualized.
The course requires extensive reading every week. Classes are based on participants familiarizing themselves with the textbook's points.
授業方法:
Combination of lectures, short reports and classroom discussions. 
Discussions will be based on 1) questions we have to the text and 2) 
analyses and readings of sources to be contextualized.The course 
requires extensive reading every week. Classes are based on participants
 familiarizing themselves with the textbook's points.

第1回:
Startup Week "Online class (On-demand format)
Introduction to the course, the textbooks etc. via video 《30分》https://～・・・
Read Gordon Chapters 1-2, OR McClain Chapter 1, OR Jansen Chapters 1-4
第2回: Core Week 1 The Period of the Waring States, arrival of the the Europeans. The Christian mission, Dutch learning, beginning of the Tokugawa bakufu. 《90分》
Read Gordon Chapters 3-4, OR McClain Chapters 2-3, OR Jansen Chapters 5-8
第3回: Read Gordon Chapters 4, OR McClain Chapters 4, OR Jansen Chapters 9-10
第4回: Core Week 3 Edo culture and society《90分》
Read Gordon Chapters 5-6, OR McClain Chapters 5-6, OR Jansen Chapters 11-12
第5回: Read Gordon Chapters 7-8, OR McClain Chapters 7-8, OR Jansen Chapters 11-12
第6回: Core Week 5 Bakumatsu to Meiji, Christianity《90分》
Read Gordon Chapters 9-10, OR McClain Chapters 9-10, OR Jansen Chapters 13-15
第7回: Read Gordon Chapter 11, OR McClain Chapter 11, OR Jansen Chapters 16-17
第8回: Read Gordon Chapters 12-13, OR McClain Chapters 12-16, OR Jansen Chapters 17-18
第9回: Read Gordon Chapters 14-18, OR McClain Chapters 17, OR Jansen Chapters 19-20
第14回: Flex Hours: Visit Osaka Castle or Kyoto's Nijo Castle and write a report 《240分》

Gordon, A Modern History of Japan: From Tokugawa Time to the Present,
Oxford University Press, Third Edition 2014; Forth Edition 2020Or

McClain, Japan: A Modern History, W.W. Norton, 2002Or
